deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this preset?
aiPromptPlaceholder: Enter custom prompt or use default analysis...
aiPromptOptional: Optional: Enter specific questions or analysis requests for the AI...
aiRequiresKey: AI features require OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
noLogsMatchFilter: No logs loaded or no logs match the current filters. Click "Search" to filter logs.
noPresetsAvailable: No saved presets. Create one by clicking the button above.
saveCurrentAsPreset: Save Current Filters as New Preset
presetsMigrated: Filter presets have been automatically migrated to the new format
atLeastOneKeywordOrTag: Please add at least one keyword or tag
filesLoaded: Loaded {{count}} file(s). Click "Search" to parse and filter logs.
logFilesTruncated: Warning: Log file(s) contained {{total}} lines. Only the first {{limit}} lines were loaded to prevent memory issues. Consider filtering the log file before opening.
filtersCleared: Filters cleared. Click "Search" to show all logs.
importPresetsThroughManager: Import presets through the Preset Manager
aiPresetGeneralDesc: Comprehensive log analysis covering errors, warnings, and patterns
aiPresetCrashDesc: Focus on crash diagnostics, stack traces, and root cause analysis
aiPresetPerformanceDesc: Analyze performance issues, lag, memory usage, and optimization opportunities
aiPresetSecurityDesc: Identify security vulnerabilities, permission issues, and potential exploits
aiPresetNetworkDesc: Focus on network requests, API calls, connectivity, and data transfer issues
aiPresetLifecycleDesc: Analyze Activity/Fragment lifecycle, state management, and navigation issues
aiPresetUIDesc: Focus on UI rendering, layout issues, touch events, and user interaction problems
noSourceFilesAdded: No source files added. Upload source code to provide AI with more context for analysis.
aiNotConfigured: AI features are not configured. Please configure in Settings.
aiSettingsUpdateFailed: Failed to update AI configuration. Please check your settings.
noNewSourceFiles: No new source files were added (duplicates were skipped).
sourceCodeSizeLimitExceeded: Warning: Source code exceeds size limit ({{size}}KB). Some files may be truncated or skipped to prevent token limit issues.
noLogsToAnalyze: No logs to analyze. Please load and filter logs first.
aiEmptyState: Click "Analyze with AI" to start analysis. Make sure logs are loaded and filtered first.
